description: Agricultural Land vs Food Production Data with Crop Production, Population, Undernourishment, and Food Trade (2000-2020)

indicators.agriculturalLand: Agricultural land (% of land area) - AG.LND.AGRI.ZS
indicators.agriculturalLandArea: Agricultural land area (10,000 sq km) - Calculated
indicators.cropProduction: Crop production (10,000 tons) - Calculated = Land area × Cereal yield
indicators.foodProductionPerCapita: Food production index per capita - Calculated
indicators.undernourishment: Prevalence of undernourishment (% of population) - SN.ITK.DEFC.ZS
indicators.foodExport: Food exports (% of merchandise exports) - TX.VAL.FOOD.ZS.UN
indicators.foodImport: Food imports (% of merchandise exports) - TM.VAL.FOOD.ZS.UN
indicators.netExportRatio: Net export ratio = Food exports - Food imports
indicators.tradeRole: Trade role classification based on net export ratio
